name: NOS
description: Finetune a model to generate new antibody sequences optimized for a given property from H and L sequences and numeric labels. Redesign CDR regions.
capabilities: Finetune a model to generate new antibody sequences optimized for a given property from H and L sequences and numeric labels

heavySequences.description: Antibody heavy chain sequences (one per line or comma-separated)

lightSequences.description: Antibody light chain sequences (one per line or comma-separated)

labels.description: Numeric property labels corresponding to each sequence pair

numSequences.description: Number of optimized antibody sequences to generate
